subject: Dratini, a small serpentine dragon Pokemon with a rounded head and white neck-mane, in an underwater coral reef setting
description: Dratini is depicted in a gentle swimming pose in what appears to be a shallow coral reef environment. The body is slender and serpentine, rendered in pale blue with a white frontal mane or neck-collar. The coral reef background is rendered in warm orange, red, and yellow coral forms contrasted against the cool blue water surrounding the creature. The mood is serene and gentle — Dratini appears at ease in its aquatic habitat. The composition is wide enough to show both the creature and its vivid coral environment.
foreground: Dratini, slender serpentine body, pale blue, white mane, gentle swimming pose
background: coral reef, underwater, orange and red coral, blue water
